name.ja: <ruby>蒼<rt>そう</rt></ruby><ruby>救<rt>きゅう</rt></ruby>の<ruby>宿<rt>しゅく</rt></ruby><ruby>願<rt>がん</rt></ruby>

requirement.en: Send 1 non-Legend Warrior or Fairy Type monster or 1 "Fusion" from your hand to the Graveyard.

effect.en: Draw 2 cards. For the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon non-Celestial Warrior Type monsters from the Extra Deck or attack with Level 8 or lower monsters.
